title: 2 PCS Polka Dot Headband, Non Slip Wide Hair Band Thick Head Bands Bandana Sweatbands Headband 50s Accessories Hair Accessories for Women Gym Workout (White,Navy Blue)
features: 【Quality and Comfortable】These elastic hair head bands are made of the fabric. Soft, breathable, lightweight, and comfortable,which can last for a long time.

【Suitable Size】This stretch headbands size is 5.5*83cm/2.2*32.7inch,good fit with your head,will not easily fall off during intense exercise,suitable for long, short, straight, wavy, curly, thick, or fine hair.Suitable for all hair types.

【Sweat absorbing】Our athletic headbands for women's hair are designed to absorb sweat effectively, keeping your face and eyes dry during intense activities, and allowing you to fully concentrate on your exercises.

【Rich Colors】There are 2 different colors dot head bands in one set,meet your different needs.let you avoid the trouble of choosing.They have adjustable wire headband is long and wide enough, so it fits almost any head comfortably.

【Wide Application】Our women's headbands are not only stylish but also practical. Suitable for running, tennis, yoga, gym, ballet, makeup, travel, hiking, outdoor sports, makeup, washing face, party, beach, study, casual days and other physical activities.
